name: DeFi Llama
description: DeFi analytics — protocol TVL, yield/APY data, stablecoin stats, DEX volumes, and chain metrics. Free, no API key needed.

tools.name: get_protocols
tools.description: Get TVL, chain breakdown, and metadata for all DeFi protocols tracked by DeFi Llama.

tools.name: get_protocol
tools.description: Get historical TVL data for a specific protocol (e.g., aave, uniswap, lido, compound).

slug.description: Protocol slug (e.g., aave, uniswap, lido, compound, makerdao)

tools.name: get_chains
tools.description: Get current TVL for all chains (Ethereum, Solana, Arbitrum, etc.).

tools.name: get_yields
tools.description: Get current APY/APR for all tracked yield pools across DeFi. Returns pool, chain, project, TVL, APY, and reward tokens.

tools.name: get_yield_chart
tools.description: Get historical APY data for a specific yield pool by its UUID.

pool.description: Pool UUID from the yields endpoint

tools.name: get_stablecoins
tools.description: Get market cap and chain distribution for all stablecoins.

tools.name: get_dex_volumes
tools.description: Get 24h trading volume for all DEXs across all chains.

tools.name: get_fees
tools.description: Get fees and revenue data for all protocols.

tools.name: get_token_prices
tools.description: Get current prices for tokens by contract address. Format: chain:address (e.g., ethereum:0xdAC17F958D2ee523a2206206994597C13D831ec7).
